padding: 20px; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0px auto;

color: orange; font-weight: bold;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 60px;
flex: 1 1 0%; padding: 40px; background: rgb(227, 242, 253); border-radius: 12px; text-align: center; border: 2px solid rgb(33, 150, 243);

attributes.style: height: 600px; background: linear-gradient(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(238, 238, 238));
padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 16px; color: white; background: rgb(51, 51, 51); border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; margin-top: 15px; font-weight: bold;
position: fixed; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 320px; height: 240px; display: block;
position: absolute; width: 320px; height: 240px; display: block; transform: scale(-1, 1);
display: block; border: solid; position: absolute; top: 40.8px; left: 80.8px; width: 158.4px; height: 158.4px;
display: block; position: fixed; z-index: 99999; left: -5px; top: -5px; background: red; border-radius: 100%; opacity: 0.7; width: 10px; height: 10px;
display: block; position: absolute; transform: scale(-1, 1); width: 320px; height: 240px;
display: none;
position: fixed; inset: 0px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); z-index: 9999; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; color: white;
position: absolute; width: 30px; height: 30px; background: red; border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer; border: 2px solid white; top: 10%; left: 10%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
